itinerary.title: Arrival in Colombo and Transfer to Negombo
itinerary.description: Arrive at Bandaranaike International Airport in Colombo. Meet our representative and transfer to the beach town of Negombo. Spend your day relaxing by the beach or lagoon.

itinerary.title: Pinnawala Elephant Orphanage and Sigiriya
itinerary.description: After breakfast, check out and visit the Pinnawala Elephant Orphanage to see rescued elephants. Drive to Sigiriya. In the evening, enjoy a local village safari or attend a traditional cultural show.

itinerary.title: Sigiriya Rock Fortress, Dambulla Caves, and Kandy
itinerary.description: Climb the famous 5th-century Sigiriya Rock Fortress in the morning. Afterwards, visit the Dambulla Cave Temple, a ancient Buddhist rock temple complex. Drive to Kandy, the cultural capital of Sri Lanka, for your overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Guided Kandy City Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Explore the highlights of Kandy. Visit the sacred Temple of the Tooth Relic and stroll through the Royal Botanical Gardens. Visit a local gem museum and watch a traditional Sri Lankan dance performance.

itinerary.title: Kandy to Nuwara Eliya Tea Country
itinerary.description: Take a scenic drive to the cool hill station of Nuwara Eliya, passing beautiful waterfalls. Tour a working tea factory and plantation, and enjoy a walk around the colonial streets and Gregory Lake.

itinerary.title: Scenic Ella Train Ride and Travel to Yala
itinerary.description: Take a beautiful train ride from Nanu Oya to the mountain town of Ella. See the famous Nine Arch Bridge, and continue your drive to Yala for your overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Yala National Park Safari and Bentota
itinerary.description: Wake up early for a guided jeep safari in Yala National Park to spot leopards, wild elephants, and birds. Afterwards, drive to the coastal resort town of Bentota.

itinerary.title: Bentota Beach Day and Galle Fort Excursion
itinerary.description: Enjoy a free day on the beach in Bentota. Take an optional excursion to the historic Galle Fort, visit a sea turtle hatchery, and enjoy a boat safari on the Madu River.

itinerary.title: Colombo City Tour and Departure
itinerary.description: Drive back to Colombo for a brief city tour to see the main sights, before transferring to the airport for your return flight home.

title: Wonders of Sri Lanka
description: Discover the ancient history, wildlife, and beaches of Sri Lanka on this 9-day tour. Climb the Sigiriya fortress, visit the temples of Kandy, take a train ride through tea country, and enjoy a safari in Yala National Park.
highlights: Climb the UNESCO-listed Sigiriya Rock Fortress
Visit the sacred Temple of the Tooth Relic in Kandy
Scenic train ride through tea plantations to Ella
Jeep safari in Yala National Park and beach stay in Bentota
